payload.title: writing-trust skill — author strict code correctly the first time
payload.description: A packaged agent skill (SKILL.md + supporting files, Claude Code skill format) that teaches: the two-line activation, named-arg/pipe/requires! syntax with examples, the full R-code remediation table (rule -> what to write instead, sourced from `trust explain --format json` so it can't drift), and the iteration loop (cargo trust build -> read JSON diagnostics -> apply fix -> rerun; reach for `trust fix` for R0042 batches). Trigger description tuned for 'working in a repo with [package.metadata.trust]' and 'user asks for Trust/strict Rust'. Ship in-repo (e.g. skills/writing-trust/) so it versions with the toolchain.
